name: Serendipity's Southern Chili
recipeIngredient: 4 cans Kidney beans, with water (16oz each)
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the butter in a large heavy pot over medium heat. Add the onion and cook until it is translucent.
2. Combine the meat with the ground chile, cumin, garlic, and pepper. Add this meat-and-spice mixture to the pot. Break up any lumps with a fork and cook, stirring occasionally, until the meat is evenly browned.
3. Stir in the remaining ingredients. Bring to a boil, then lower the heat and simmer, uncovered, for at least 4 hours but as many as 8 if possible. Stir occasionally. Taste and adjust seasonings.
